interfaces.name: getSidebarOverview
interfaces.description: Get high-level information for the left sidebar (section badges, storage summary, trash count).

badgeCount.description: Optional count badge for the section (e.g., items in Trash, new shares).

isNearLimit.description: True if usage is above a warning threshold.

trashItemsCount.description: Total number of items currently in Trash.

interfaces.name: getSpecialFolder
interfaces.description: Resolve a well-known folder (Documents, Projects, Videos, Reports) to its StorageItem so the UI can open it.

interfaces.name: getRootFolderContents
interfaces.description: Get the contents of the My Files root (items with no parent).

searchQuery.description: Optional text search scoped to the root folder.

fileType.description: Optional high-level file type filter, e.g., 'document', 'spreadsheet', 'pdf', 'video', 'image', 'archive', 'other'.

onlyStarred.description: If true, only starred items are returned.

modifiedFrom.description: Return items modified on or after this timestamp.

modifiedTo.description: Return items modified on or before this timestamp.

breadcrumb.description: Breadcrumb for the current location; for root this is typically a single 'My Files' entry.

hasMore.description: True if more items are available via pagination.

interfaces.name: getFolderContents
interfaces.description: Get the contents of a specific folder, with optional search and filtering.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: ID of the folder whose contents should be listed.

searchQuery.description: Optional text search scoped to this folder.

fileType.description: Optional high-level file type filter, e.g., 'document', 'spreadsheet', 'pdf', 'video', 'image', 'archive', 'other'.

onlyStarred.description: If true, only starred items are returned.

modifiedFrom.description: Return items modified on or after this timestamp.

modifiedTo.description: Return items modified on or before this timestamp.

interfaces.name: createFolder
interfaces.description: Create a new folder inside the specified parent folder.

parameters.name: parentFolderId
parameters.description: ID of the parent folder where the new folder will be created.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the new folder, e.g., 'Invoices 2024' or 'Q3 Reports'.

interfaces.name: uploadFilesToFolder
interfaces.description: Register one or more uploaded files into a target folder. Actual binary upload is handled separately; this finalizes metadata and creation.

parameters.name: parentFolderId
parameters.description: Folder where the uploaded files will be placed.

clientFileId.description: Client-side temporary identifier for the uploaded file.

interfaces.name: searchFolderItems
interfaces.description: Perform a scoped search within a specific folder with filters and sorting, used by the local search bar in My Files.

parameters.name: folderId
parameters.description: Folder to search within, e.g., the Documents folder.

modifiedFrom.description: Only include items modified on or after this timestamp.

modifiedTo.description: Only include items modified on or before this timestamp.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Sort direction: 'asc' or 'desc'. Only applies to non-relevance sorts.

interfaces.name: globalSearchItems
interfaces.description: Search across the entire account (or optionally a path prefix) with rich filters and sorting; drives the Search Results page and 'View all files' scenarios.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search text; if omitted or empty, all items matching filters are returned.

modifiedFrom.description: Only items modified on or after this timestamp.

modifiedTo.description: Only items modified on or before this timestamp.

pathPrefix.description: Optional path prefix to limit results, e.g., '/Reports/'.

interfaces.name: moveItemsToFolder
interfaces.description: Move one or more files/folders to a destination folder (used from My Files, Search Results, and Storage views).

interfaces.name: copyItemsToFolder
interfaces.description: Copy one or more files/folders to a destination folder.

interfaces.name: renameItem
interfaces.description: Rename a single file or folder.

parameters.name: itemId
parameters.description: ID of the item to rename.

parameters.name: newName
parameters.description: New display name for the item.

interfaces.name: setItemStarStatus
interfaces.description: Star or unstar a file or folder.

parameters.name: starred
parameters.description: True to star, false to unstar.

interfaces.name: setItemsOfflineStatus
interfaces.description: Mark one or more files or folders as available offline or online-only.

parameters.name: isAvailableOffline
parameters.description: True to make available offline, false to remove offline availability.

interfaces.name: softDeleteItems
interfaces.description: Move one or more items to Trash (soft delete).

parameters.name: itemIds
parameters.description: IDs of items to move to Trash.

interfaces.name: restoreItemsFromTrash
interfaces.description: Restore items from Trash to their original locations.

interfaces.name: permanentlyDeleteItems
interfaces.description: Permanently delete items from Trash.

parameters.name: itemIds
parameters.description: IDs of items to permanently delete.

interfaces.name: getSharingSettingsForItem
interfaces.description: Get current sharing configuration for a file or folder, including collaborators and share links, for the sharing panel.

parameters.name: storageItemId
parameters.description: Item whose sharing settings should be retrieved.

interfaces.name: updateCollaboratorsForItem
interfaces.description: Add or update collaborator permissions (viewer/editor and download rights) for a file or folder.

parameters.name: collaborators

allowDownload.description: True if this collaborator may download the item.

parameters.description: Collaborator entries to add or update.

interfaces.name: upsertShareLinkForItem
interfaces.description: Create or update a primary share link for an item, including access scope, permission level, download setting, and expiration.

parameters.name: storageItemId
parameters.description: Item for which the share link is being configured.

parameters.name: accessLevel
parameters.description: Who can access via the link: 'only_invited_people' or 'anyone_with_link'.

parameters.name: permission
parameters.description: Permission granted by the link: 'can_view' or 'can_edit'.

parameters.name: allowDownload
parameters.description: True to allow downloads through the link, false to disable download.

parameters.name: expiresAt
parameters.description: Optional expiration timestamp for the link.

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: If false, the link is disabled (revoked) but configuration is retained.

interfaces.name: getStorageOverview
interfaces.description: Get overall storage usage summary, including usage by top-level folder and by file type, plus a sample of largest files.

folderKey.description: Key for a top-level area, e.g., 'documents', 'projects', 'videos', 'reports', 'other'.

interfaces.name: getStorageFileList
interfaces.description: List files for the Storage & Usage 'View all files' view, with filters and sorting optimized for size-based cleanup.

minSizeBytes.description: Minimum file size in bytes (e.g., 500 * 1024 * 1024 for 500 MB).

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Sort direction: 'asc' or 'desc'. Use 'desc' for 'largest first'.

interfaces.name: getRecentItems
interfaces.description: Get the list of recently opened items, with optional filtering and sorting.

interfaces.name: getIncomingSharesList
interfaces.description: Get items that have been shared with the current user for the 'Shared with me' page.

interfaces.name: getTrashItems
interfaces.description: List items currently in Trash, with sorting and basic filters.

interfaces.name: getFileViewerContext
interfaces.description: Get all information needed to open a file in the File Viewer, including file details, location, labels, and sharing summary.

parameters.name: storageItemId
parameters.description: File to open in the viewer.

offlineStatus.description: True if the file is marked as available offline.

primaryLink.description: Primary share link if one exists; null otherwise.

interfaces.name: getFileVersionHistory
interfaces.description: Fetch the full version history for a versioned file for display in the File Viewer.

parameters.name: storageItemId
parameters.description: File whose versions should be listed.

interfaces.name: restoreFileVersion
interfaces.description: Restore a file to a specific historical version.

interfaces.name: getLabelsList
interfaces.description: List existing labels that can be applied to items.

interfaces.name: createLabel
interfaces.description: Create a new label, e.g., 'Confidential'.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: Optional color identifier or hex code.

interfaces.name: applyLabelToItem
interfaces.description: Apply an existing label to a file or folder.

interfaces.name: removeLabelFromItem
interfaces.description: Remove a label from a file or folder.

parameters.name: storageItemId
parameters.description: Item to remove the label from.

interfaces.name: getUserSettings
interfaces.description: Retrieve current user settings for default sort, view, language, sharing defaults, offline behavior, and notifications.

defaultLinkAllowDownload.description: Whether downloads are allowed by default on new share links.

offlineMaxSizeMb.description: Maximum size in MB for offline storage.

interfaces.name: updateUserSettings
interfaces.description: Update user settings; only provided fields are changed.

defaultLinkAllowDownload.description: Whether downloads are allowed by default on new share links.

interfaces.name: getHelpTopicsOverview
interfaces.description: Get categorized help topics and featured articles for the Help & Support page.

interfaces.name: searchHelpArticles
interfaces.description: Search help content by keyword, e.g., 'share with expiry date' or 'restore version'.

interfaces.name: getStaticPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for static informational pages such as About, Privacy Policy, and Terms of Service.

interfaces.name: getContactCategories
interfaces.description: Get the list of contact categories to populate the contact form dropdown.

interfaces.name: submitContactRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a contact/support request from the Contact page.

parameters.name: categoryKey
parameters.description: Category selected by the user, e.g., 'technical_issue', 'billing_question'.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Short subject line for the request.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Detailed description of the issue or feedback.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Optional contact email if different from account email.

helperFunctions.name: _resolveSpecialFolderId
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to map a special folder key (e.g., 'documents') to its StorageItem ID.

helperFunctions.name: _applyItemFiltersAndSorting
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to apply filter and sort parameters to a collection of StorageItem records.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreatePrimaryShareLink
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to find or create the primary ShareLink record for a given StorageItem.

helperFunctions.name: _ensureLabelExists
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper that returns an existing Label with the given name or creates it if missing.

helperFunctions.name: _getUserSettingsInternal
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load user settings from persistent storage for the single-user environment.

helperFunctions.name: _updateStorageUsageCache
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate and cache storage usage statistics after item operations.
